steps.title: Find the purpose signal
steps.content: The first sentence says Dowsett sought to coordinate suffragist efforts in Hawai‘i, which sets up a goal that the next sentence should show her taking action to achieve.

“To that end,” signals that the founding of the association was done to fulfill her goal of uniting suffragists.
Conversely, Alternatively, and In other words each introduce a contrast, alternative, or restatement, which does not fit the purposeful action described.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
steps.title: Apply the purpose signal
